name: agreements-protocol-onchain
description: EVM implementation of the Agreements Protocol

scripts.erc8004:check: npm run erc8004:compile && npm run erc8004:lint && npm run erc8004:test
scripts.lint: npm run contracts:compile && npm run sdk:lint && npm run contracts:lint
scripts.test: npm run contracts:compile && npm run sdk:build && npm run sdk:test && npm run contracts:test
scripts.prepare: command -v husky >/dev/null 2>&1 && husky install || echo "husky not installed, skipping prepare"
